feedItems.description: allocated £26.5m to Environment & Streets (≈£102 per resident)
allocated £127.1m to Adult Social Care (≈£490 per resident)
allocated £73.3m to Children's Social Care (≈£283 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £109 (5.1%) to £2266
